name: IdsEdwPaymtRductnActvtyHistFExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH main_data AS (SELECT PMTRDTNACVTY.PAYMT_RDUCTN_ACTVTY_SK AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_ACTVTY_SK,PMTRDTNACVTY.PAYMT_RDUCTN_REF_ID AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_REF_ID,COALESCE(CDMPG1.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_SUBTYP_CD,PMTRDTNACVTY.PAYMT_RDUCTN_ACTVTY_SEQ_NO AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_ACTVTY_SEQ_NO,COALESCE(CDMPG2.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD,COALESCE(PMTRDTN.PAYMT_RDUCTN_SK,'NA') AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_SK,PMTRDTNACVTY.USER_SK AS APP_USER_SK,COALESCE(CDMPG3.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_ACTVTY_EVT_TYP_CD,COALESCE(CDMPG3.TRGT_CD_NM,'UNK') AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_ACTVTY_EVT_TYP_NM,COALESCE(CDMPG4.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_ACTVTY_RSN_CD,COALESCE(CDMPG4.TRGT_CD_NM,'UNK') AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_ACTVTY_RSN_NM,COALESCE(CDMPG5.TRGT_CD_NM,'UNK') AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_SUBTYP_NM,PMTRDTNACVTY.ACCTG_PERD_END_DT_SK AS ACCTG_PERD_END_DT_SK,PMTRDTNACVTY.CRT_DT_SK AS CRT_DT_SK,PMTRDTNACVTY.RFND_RCVD_DT_SK AS RFND_RCVD_DT_SK,PMTRDTNACVTY.PAYMT_RDUCTN_ACTVTY_AMT AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_ACTVTY_AMT,PMTRDTNACVTY.PCA_RCVR_AMT AS PCA_RCVR_AMT,PMTRDTNACVTY.PAYMT_REF_ID AS PAYMT_REF_ID,PMTRDTNACVTY.RCVD_CHK_NO AS RCVD_CHK_NO,PMTRDTNACVTY.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,PMTRDTNACVTY.PAYMT_RDUCTN_ACT_EVT_TYP_CD_SK AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_ACTVTY_EVT_TYP_CD_SK,PMTRDTNACVTY.PAYMT_RDUCTN_ACTVTY_RSN_CD_SK AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_ACTVTY_RSN_CD_SK,PMTRDTNACVTY.PAYMT_RDUCTN_SUBTYP_CD_SK AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_SUBTYP_CD_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.PAYMT_RDUCTN_ACTVTY PMTRDTNACVTY LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CDMPG1 ON PMTRDTNACVTY.PAYMT_RDUCTN_SUBTYP_CD_SK=CDMPG1.CD_MPPNG_SK LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CDMPG2 ON PMTRDTNACVTY.SRC_SYS_CD_SK=CDMPG2.CD_MPPNG_SK LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.PAYMT_RDUCTN PMTRDTN ON PMTRDTN.PAYMT_RDUCTN_REF_ID=PMTRDTNACVTY.PAYMT_RDUCTN_REF_ID AND PMTRDTN.PAYMT_RDUCTN_SUBTYP_CD_SK=PMTRDTNACVTY.PAYMT_RDUCTN_SUBTYP_CD_SK LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CDMPG3 ON PMTRDTNACVTY.PAYMT_RDUCTN_ACT_EVT_TYP_CD_SK=CDMPG3.CD_MPPNG_SK LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CDMPG4 ON PMTRDTNACVTY.PAYMT_RDUCTN_ACTVTY_RSN_CD_SK=CDMPG4.CD_MPPNG_SK LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CDMPG5 ON PMTRDTNACVTY.PAYMT_RDUCTN_SUBTYP_CD_SK=CDMPG5.CD_MPPNG_SK WHERE ((PMTRDTNACVTY.PAYMT_RDUCTN_SK NOT IN (0,1) AND PMTRDTNACVTY.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.ExtractRunCycle} AND COALESCE(CDMPG2.TRGT_CD,'UNK')='FACETS') OR (PMTRDTNACVTY.PAYMT_RDUCTN_SK NOT IN (0,1) AND PMTRDTNACVTY.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.LHOExtractRunCycle} AND COALESCE(CDMPG2.TRGT_CD,'UNK')='LUMERIS')),BusinessLogic AS (SELECT PAYMT_RDUCTN_ACTVTY_SK,PAYMT_RDUCTN_REF_ID,PAYMT_RDUCTN_SUBTYP_CD,PAYMT_RDUCTN_ACTVTY_SEQ_NO,SRC_SYS_CD,@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,PAYMT_RDUCTN_SK,APP_USER_SK,PAYMT_RDUCTN_ACTVTY_EVT_TYP_CD,PAYMT_RDUCTN_ACTVTY_EVT_TYP_NM,PAYMT_RDUCTN_ACTVTY_RSN_CD,PAYMT_RDUCTN_ACTVTY_RSN_NM,PAYMT_RDUCTN_SUBTYP_NM,ACCTG_PERD_END_DT_SK,CRT_DT_SK,RFND_RCVD_DT_SK,PAYMT_RDUCTN_ACTVTY_AMT,PCA_RCVR_AMT,PAYMT_REF_ID,RCVD_CHK_NO,@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,PAYMT_RDUCTN_ACTVTY_EVT_TYP_CD_SK,PAYMT_RDUCTN_ACTVTY_RSN_CD_SK,PAYMT_RDUCTN_SUBTYP_CD_SK FROM main_data),UNK AS (SELECT 0 AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_ACTVTY_SK,'UNK' AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_REF_ID,'UNK' AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_SUBTYP_CD,0 AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_ACTVTY_SEQ_NO,'UNK' AS SRC_SYS_CD,@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,0 AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_SK,0 AS APP_USER_SK,'UNK' AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_ACTVTY_EVT_TYP_CD,'UNK' AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_ACTVTY_EVT_TYP_NM,'UNK' AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_ACTVTY_RSN_CD,'UNK' AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_ACTVTY_RSN_NM,'UNK' AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_SUBTYP_NM,'UNK' AS ACCTG_PERD_END_DT_SK,'UNK' AS CRT_DT_SK,'UNK' AS RFND_RCVD_DT_SK,0 AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_ACTVTY_AMT,0 AS PCA_RCVR_AMT,'UNK' AS PAYMT_REF_ID,'UNK' AS RCVD_CHK_NO,100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,0 AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,0 AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_ACTVTY_EVT_TYP_CD_SK,0 AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_ACTVTY_RSN_CD_SK,0 AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_SUBTYP_CD_SK),NA AS (SELECT 1 AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_ACTVTY_SK,'NA' AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_REF_ID,'NA' AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_SUBTYP_CD,0 AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_ACTVTY_SEQ_NO,'NA' AS SRC_SYS_CD,@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,1 AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_SK,1 AS APP_USER_SK,'NA' AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_ACTVTY_EVT_TYP_CD,'NA' AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_ACTVTY_EVT_TYP_NM,'NA' AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_ACTVTY_RSN_CD,'NA' AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_ACTVTY_RSN_NM,'NA' AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_SUBTYP_NM,'NA' AS ACCTG_PERD_END_DT_SK,'NA' AS CRT_DT_SK,'NA' AS RFND_RCVD_DT_SK,0 AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_ACTVTY_AMT,0 AS PCA_RCVR_AMT,'NA' AS PAYMT_REF_ID,'NA' AS RCVD_CHK_NO,100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,1 AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,1 AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_ACTVTY_EVT_TYP_CD_SK,1 AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_ACTVTY_RSN_CD_SK,1 AS PAYMT_RDUCTN_SUBTYP_CD_SK) SELECT * FROM BusinessLogic UNION ALL SELECT * FROM UNK UNION ALL SELECT * FROM NA

DESCRIPTION:  
This job extracts the records from the IDS table PAYMT_RDUCTN_ACTVTY, transform and write the records into a load ready file.

Add Defaults and Null Handling

Write Data into load ready file
